summary: Classified the only open candidate, #67477, as the current open canonical PR for the remaining WhatsApp auto-reply sent-hook parity work. Closed #71217 and #56495 are historical evidence only: #71217 landed WhatsApp message_received hooks, while #70118/#66579 cover the shared message_sending cancel/rewrite path. #67477 retains unique message_sent/internal message:sent work and should stay open; no close, label, comment, merge, or fix action is planned.

actions.reason: #67477 is not a duplicate or superseded by the closed representative. It is the best surviving open PR for the remaining WhatsApp auto-reply message_sent/message:sent parity work, but it is not merge-ready and this dedupe-only job blocks merge, fix, and raise_pr actions.
